prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年最低位次约11412→11217→10593→8356→10415，整体呈波动趋势。2024年大幅前移至8358名（近年最佳），2025年回落至10415名，可能与陕西省首次实施新高考（物理类）有关，近3年累计后移约180名；2021-2024年计划均为102人，2025年增至108人，2026年计划大幅扩招至141人，较2025年增加33人（增幅约30.6%），扩招幅度显著，对竞争压力有明显缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名约第38名（2026年），近年排名稳定在36-39名区间，属于中上游985高校；2025年声誉偏负面（实习安全事故），2026年声誉中性/混合（校区争议）；抖音热度一般（总排名第82位），未出现投档断档记录；整体声誉对报考热度影响中性；控制科学与工程A+（全国顶尖）、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A-、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-、冶金工程A；其中控制、计算机、软件等均为当前高热推荐专业方向，对考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约34000人（增幅约19.7%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；东北大学位于辽宁沈阳，属跨省招生；该校在陕西招生计划占比较高（2025年108人），且2026年大幅扩招至141人，体现对陕西生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10415名、2026年大幅扩招（+33人，+30.6%）、陕西省物理类考生大幅增加（+19.7%）、优势学科（控制A+、计算机A等）持续高热等因素：扩招大幅降低竞争压力（位次数字增大），但考生激增和热门专业吸引力部分抵消扩招效应。预测最低位次约12125名，区间11625-12625名。

一档（最难进）
- 自动化类（自动化、电气工程及其自动化、测控技术与仪器、电子科学与技术、工业智能）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 机器人工程
- 智能制造工程
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、通信工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（软件工程、信息安全、数字媒体技术）
- 软件工程（特色班）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 机械类（机械工程、过程装备与控制工程、车辆工程、工业设计）
- 应用物理学
- 智能医学工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料类（材料科学与工程、材料成型及控制工程、材料物理）
- 工科试验班（冶金工程、环境科学、资源循环科学与工程）
- 工科试验班（矿物加工工程、测绘工程、资源勘查工程、环境工程、安全工程、土木工程）
- 生物工程类（生物工程、生物制药）
- 经济管理试验班（工商管理、市场营销、会计学、工业工程、信息管理与信息系统、金融学、经济学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11625-12625名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向、一档王牌专业（自动化类、计算机科学与技术）作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如11625名以内）可重点冲刺一档专业；位次接近区间上限（12625名以外）应以三档保底为主。东北大学控制科学与工程A+、计算机A等优势学科对应专业报考热度高，需合理评估竞争态势。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking fluctuated: approximately 11412 → 11217 → 10593 → 8356 → 10415. In 2024, it significantly advanced to 8358 (best in recent years), but fell back to 10415 in 2025, possibly due to Shaanxi's first implementation of the new Gaokao (Physics Category). Over the past 3 years, the ranking has shifted backward by about 180 places. The enrollment plan was 102 from 2021 to 2024, increased to 108 in 2025, and will significantly expand to 141 in 2026, an increase of 33 students (about 30.6%) compared to 2025. This substantial expansion notably alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 38th, with recent rankings stable in the 36-39 range, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 985 universities. In 2025, its reputation was slightly negative (due to a safety incident during internships), while in 2026, it is neutral/mixed (due to campus disputes). Its Douyin popularity is average (82nd overall), with no record of admission cut-off drops. Overall reputation has a neutral impact on application enthusiasm. Its top disciplines include Control Science and Engineering (A+, nationally top-tier), Computer Science and Technology (A), Software Engineering (A-), Mechanical Engineering (A-), Materials Science and Engineering (A-), and Metallurgical Engineering (A). Among these, Control, Computer, and Software are currently highly recommended majors, strongly attracting applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly popular. In 2026, Shaanxi Province is expected to have about 206,500 Physics Category examinees, an increase of about 34,000 (approximately 19.7%) from 172,468 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning, and recruits across provinces. Its enrollment plan in Shaanxi accounts for a relatively high proportion (108 in 2025), and the significant expansion to 141 in 2026 reflects its emphasis on Shaanxi students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10415, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+33 students, +30.6%), the large increase in Shaanxi Physics Category examinees (+19.7%), and the sustained popularity of advantageous disciplines (Control A+, Computer A, etc.): the expansion greatly reduces competitive pressure (ranking number increases), but the surge in examinees and the appeal of popular majors partially offset the expansion effect. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12125, with a range of 11625-12625.

- Engineering Pilot Class (Mineral Processing Engineering, Surveying and Mapping Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Safety Engineering, Civil Engineering)

- Economics and Management Pilot Class (Business Administration, Marketing, Accounting, Industrial Engineering, Information Management and Information Systems, Finance, Economics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 11625-12625, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Automation, Computer Science and Technology) as reach options, and use Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 11625), you can prioritize Tier 1 majors. If your ranking is near the upper bound (outside 12625), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety. Northeastern University's advantageous disciplines, such as Control Science and Engineering (A+) and Computer Science (A), correspond to highly popular majors, so you need to reasonably assess the competitive situation.
